description: Available in a range of colours and sizes S-6XL, Blackrock's best selling Sleevesless Hi Vis Vest is lightweight and comfortable to wear with 2 bands and 2 braces of reflective tape to ensure you are seen. It features a hook and loop closure for easy putting on and removal.
